whoAmI.content: I'm a 17-year-old male (He/Him) and I'm Omnisexual. My timezone is PST and my birthday is December 20th. I also have 2 Shih Tzu dogs named Zuko and Azula (yes they're named after the Avatar characters).

manhwa: Tower of God (still need to read)
anime: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime (all time favorite and a very good watch/read)

hobbies.content: I enjoy gaming, listening to music, and learning new things like playing guitar. I also like working on websites and sometimes Discord bots as well — all of it's for fun and it's a learning process for me.
